name: Count
definition: Total API requests in a period; the primary traffic baseline and denominator for most RED formulas.
absence_means: Metric absent in the current workspace, detailed metrics disabled for route splits, or no requests in the selected window.
cardinality_footguns: Use API, stage, resource, and method only. Never group by request identifiers.

name: 4XXError
definition: Requests ending in 4xx. High values usually indicate caller, auth, usage-plan, or validation problems rather than API Gateway infrastructure failure.
absence_means: Metric absent in the current workspace, detailed metrics disabled for route splits, or no recent 4xx responses.
cardinality_footguns: Do not group by request IDs or high-cardinality identity fields.

name: 5XXError
definition: Requests ending in 5xx. Highest-signal server-side failure metric for API Gateway request handling.
absence_means: Metric absent in the current workspace, detailed metrics disabled for route splits, or no recent 5xx responses.
cardinality_footguns: Keep separate from 4xx because the ownership domain is different.

name: Latency
definition: End-to-end request latency observed by API Gateway in milliseconds. Closest metric to user-perceived API latency in this core family.
absence_means: Metric absent in the current workspace or no requests in the selected window.
cardinality_footguns: The live Tsuga catalog exposes avg|sum|count|min|max only; do not assume percentile support.

name: IntegrationLatency
definition: Milliseconds API Gateway waits for the backend integration to respond. Best backend-latency component in the core metric family.
absence_means: Metric absent in the current workspace or no requests in the selected window.
cardinality_footguns: Interpret together with Latency; on its own it cannot distinguish gateway overhead.

name: NOT_APPLICABLE
definition: The core API Gateway CloudWatch metric family does not expose direct cost. Use Count, Latency, and IntegrationLatency as cost-adjacent proxies until billing or usage-plan spend data is integrated.
absence_means: Not applicable in the core execution-metric family.
cardinality_footguns: Do not invent spend widgets from request KPIs alone.
